title: Burnt Dynamic Trees
description: Adds compat between Burnt and Dynamic Trees
body:
Enables Burnt and Dynamic Trees to be used together

- Dynamic trees burn branch by branch
- Half burnt trees fall as expected
- Burnt trees break down and regrow over time
- Compatible with many Custom x DT mods
  - Ars Nouveau
  - Biomes O'Plenty
  - Cobblemon
  - Croptopia
  - Forbidden And Arcanus
  - Oh the Biomes We've Gone
  - Quark
  - Regions Unexplored
  - Terralith
  - Nature's Spirit
  - Harvestcraft 2
  
Requires Burnt Basic v10 and above
